data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang and Eastern Sabah until 6:00AM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang dan Sabah Timur sehingga 6:00 pagi; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Southern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, Bunguran, Reef North, Layang-Layang, Palawan and Sulu until 6:00AM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka Selatan, Samui, Tioman, Condore, Bunguran, Reef North, Layang-Layang, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 6:00 pagi; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
